item.text: I’m going to scan `crates/*/src` for all `RefName::new` occurrences, then separate true function-value uses (like `.map(RefName::new)`) from direct calls that must be excluded.
I found 14 total hits; next I’m verifying which are inside test modules so we can exclude tests/examples entirely and only classify production sites.

   253	fn parse_ref_name(ref_name: Option<String>) -> Result<Option<RefName>, OrbitError> {
   254	    ref_name
   255	        .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
   256	        .map(RefName::new)
   257	        .transpose()

   261	fn node_context_to_json(
   262	    svc: &GraphContextService<'_>,
   263	    ctx: &orbit_knowledge::service::NodeContext<'_>,
   264	) -> serde_json::Value {
   265	    let node = ctx.node;
   266

   123	
   124	pub fn resolve_graph_write_target(
   125	    workspace_path: &Path,
   126	    explicit_ref: Option<&str>,
   127	) -> Result<GraphWriteTarget, OrbitError> {
   128	    let requested = match explicit_ref.filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty()) {
   129	        Some(explicit_ref) => parse_ref_name(explicit_ref)?,
   130	        None => resolve_current_ref(workspace_path)?,
   131	    };
   132	
   133	    Ok(GraphWriteTarget {
   134	        requested,
   135	        default: resolve_default_ref(workspace_path)?,
   136	    })
   137	}
   138	
   139	fn parse_ref_name(value: &str) -> Result<RefName, OrbitError> {
   140	    RefName::new(value).map_err(|error| OrbitError::InvalidInput(error.to_string()))
   141	}
   142	
   143	fn resolve_current_ref(workspace_path: &Path) -> Result<RefName, OrbitError> {
   144	    match git_current_branch(workspace_path)? {
   145	        CurrentBranchStatus::Named(branch) => {
   146	            RefName::new(branch).map_err(|error| OrbitError::InvalidInput(error.to_string()))
   147	        }
   148	        CurrentBranchStatus::DetachedHead => Err(OrbitError::Execution(format!(
   149	            "workspace '{}' is in detached HEAD; pass `--ref <name>` to select a knowledge-graph ref",
   150	            workspace_path.display()
   151	        ))),
   152	        CurrentBranchStatus::NoCurrentBranch => Err(OrbitError::Execution(format!(
   153	            "workspace '{}' has no current branch; pass `--ref <name>` to select a knowledge-graph ref",
   154	            workspace_path.display()
   155	        ))),
   156	    }
   157	}
   158	
   159	fn resolve_default_ref(workspace_path: &Path) -> Result<Option<RefName>, OrbitError> {
   160	    git_default_branch(workspace_path)?
   161	        .map(RefName::new)
   162	        .transpose()
   163	        .map_err(|error| {
   164	            OrbitError::Execution(format!(
   165	                "resolved default branch for '{}' is invalid: {error}",
   166	                workspace_path.display()
   167	            ))
   168	        })
   169	}

item.text: I’ve confirmed the test-only hits; now I’m running a strict regex to capture only function-value uses (`RefName::new` not followed by `(`) so the answer set is complete.
